title: gymnodiscus capillaris
intro: Gymnodiscus capillaris, also known as the False Coltsfoot, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Gymnodiscus capillaris include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
